positive: A celestial-themed woodland creature study, featuring a stylized fox perched amongst bioluminescent moons and floating cosmic flora. The style must be highly detailed vector illustration, resembling modern folk art mixed with Art Nouveau influences. Use clean, solid silhouettes with intricate line work and negative space definition. The color palette should use deep indigo, sapphire blue, gold metallic accents, and deep emerald green, ensuring strong contrast for visibility on dark apparel. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, filling the frame beautifully without hard edges or gradients, optimized for repeat pattern potential. Studio quality, high contrast, clean linework, vector art, ethereal, mystical.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, gradient, photorealistic, painting, oil paint, airbrush, messy, low contrast, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate, cropped, ugly, jpeg artifacts
